data.title: River Global Grants Major Restricted Share Awards and Corrects Treasury Share Count
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

River Global PLC Class A ( (GB:RVRG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

River Global PLC has granted rights over up to 14,431,309 A Ordinary Shares, representing about 8.24% of its voting A Ordinary Share capital, under a restricted share scheme that will vest between April and November 2028, largely through the issuance of new shares and subject to standard malus, clawback and leaver provisions. Of this award, 4,595,588 A Ordinary Shares have been allocated to Gary Marshall, the Group’s Chief Finance and Operating Officer and a person discharging managerial responsibilities, while the company has also corrected a prior understatement in its treasury share count, confirming that it now has 160,608,200 voting A Ordinary Shares and 143,938,200 voting B Shares in issue, figures which shareholders should use when assessing disclosure thresholds for their holdings.

More about River Global PLC Class A

River Global PLC is a listed company with dual A and B ordinary share classes, indicating a structured equity base that distinguishes between voting A Ordinary Shares and B Shares. The company actively manages its capital structure, including the use of treasury shares, and is subject to UK regulatory frameworks such as the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules and the Market Abuse Regulation.

Average Trading Volume: 116,473

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: £66.64M

data.title: Kaldvík Names Experienced Interim CFO to Steer Finance During Transition
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ice Fish Farm AS ( (DE:4YYA) ) has issued an announcement.

Kaldvík AS has appointed Hjalti Hvítklett as interim chief financial officer, effective 1 February 2026, following the previously announced resignation of its current CFO. Hvítklett brings extensive financial leadership experience from roles at Nordic Aqua Partners and P/F Pelagos and will support Kaldvík’s strategy and growth plans while the company continues its search for a permanent finance chief, helping to maintain operational continuity and investor confidence during the management transition.

More about Ice Fish Farm AS

Kaldvík AS is Iceland’s leading salmon farmer, operating a fully integrated value chain that supports the production and distribution of sustainable premium salmon products. The company is dual-listed on Euronext Growth Oslo and the First North Iceland Growth Market, targeting customers seeking high-quality, responsibly sourced seafood.

Average Trading Volume: 10,430

Current Market Cap: NOK1.3B

data.title: Nativo Resources Issues 35.9 Million New Shares on CLN Conversion
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Echo Energy ( (GB:NTVO) ).

Nativo Resources has received a conversion notice from YA II PN Ltd for £180,000 of principal and accrued interest on its convertible loan notes, resulting in the issue of 35,859,790 new ordinary shares at £0.0051 per share. Following admission of these shares to trading on AIM, expected around 2 February 2026, Nativo’s issued share capital will rise to 629,063,290 ordinary shares, diluting existing shareholders but reducing the outstanding CLN principal to £1.44m ahead of its November 2026 maturity and clarifying the company’s updated total voting rights for regulatory notification purposes.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:NTVO) stock is a Hold with a £0.56 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Echo Energy stock, see the GB:NTVO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:NTVO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:NTVO is a Neutral.

The score is driven down primarily by very weak financial performance (losses, negative equity, high leverage vs assets, and cash burn). Technicals provide only partial support due to a strong short-term rebound, but stretched momentum and a position below the 200-day average temper the signal. Valuation is also unfavorable because earnings are negative and there is no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:NTVO stock, click here.

More about Echo Energy

Nativo Resources plc is a gold-focused mining company with interests in several projects in Peru. Its strategy centres on primary gold mining, gold ore processing and the recovery of gold from tailings, with near-term plans to scale operations at the Tesoro Gold Concession’s Bonanza and Morrocota mines. The company also intends to allocate a portion of free cash flow and future fundraises to Bitcoin purchases, holding the cryptocurrency as a long-term treasury reserve asset.

data.title: Kobo Resources to Raise $287,000 in Non-Brokered Private Placement
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kobo Resources Inc. ( (TSE:KRI) ) has shared an announcement.

Kobo Resources Inc. plans to raise approximately $287,492 through a non-brokered private placement of 958,306 common shares at $0.30 per share, with the securities issued under Canadian prospectus exemptions and subject to a four-month hold period. The proceeds will be directed to general corporate and working capital purposes, with the financing expected to close around February 3, 2026, pending TSX Venture Exchange and other required approvals, providing additional funding to support the company’s ongoing gold exploration and development activities in Côte d’Ivoire.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:KRI) stock is a Buy with a C$0.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kobo Resources Inc. stock, see the TSE:KRI Stock Forecast page.

More about Kobo Resources Inc.

Kobo Resources Inc. is a growth-focused gold exploration company operating primarily in Côte d’Ivoire, within one of West Africa’s most prolific gold districts. Its flagship asset is the 100%-owned Kossou Gold Project near Yamoussoukro, adjacent to a major operating gold mine and processing facilities. Since 2023, Kobo has completed extensive diamond and reverse circulation drilling and trenching to define the scale and prospectivity of Kossou, confirming extensive mineralisation at the Jagger, Road Cut and Kadie zones. The company is also advancing exploration at its Kotobi Permit and expanding its land position in Côte d’Ivoire, targeting long-term growth in high-potential gold regions of West Africa.

Average Trading Volume: 111,706

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$27.69M

See more insights into KRI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: MTL Cannabis Sets February Vote on Premium Takeover by Canopy Growth
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

MTL Cannabis ( (TSE:MTLC) ) just unveiled an update.

MTL Cannabis has mailed its management information circular and proxy materials for a special shareholder meeting on February 17, 2026, where investors will vote on a proposed plan of arrangement under which Canopy Growth Corporation would acquire all outstanding MTL Cannabis shares. Under the deal terms, MTL shareholders would receive a mix of Canopy Growth shares and cash representing a substantial premium to MTL’s recent trading prices, along with improved liquidity via Canopy’s dual listings on Nasdaq and the TSX, broader exposure to international cannabis markets, and access to stronger capital markets and growth capital, while Canopy plans to retain key members of MTL’s leadership team to bolster its cultivation and operational capabilities.

More about MTL Cannabis

MTL Cannabis Corp. is a Canadian cannabis producer listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange and OTCQX, focused on cultivating and selling high-quality cannabis products. The company operates within the regulated cannabis industry and has historically faced limited trading liquidity and challenges accessing equity capital markets compared with larger, more diversified sector players.

Average Trading Volume: 156,615

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$74.59M

For a thorough assessment of MTLC stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: China Innovation Flags Governance and Meeting Irregularities at Elife Holdings
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

China Innovation Investment Limited ( (HK:1217) ) has provided an announcement.

China Innovation Investment Limited, as a substantial shareholder of Elife Holdings Limited, has publicly raised serious concerns over corporate governance practices at Elife, alleging that three executive directors’ terms should have automatically expired in September 2025 under Elife’s articles of association, rendering their subsequent actions on behalf of the company invalid. The investor further contends that notices convening Elife’s January 2026 annual and extraordinary general meetings failed to comply with statutory notice periods and Hong Kong listing rules on closure of the register of members, and has formally requested that Elife adjourn or cancel the scheduled meetings while reserving its right to seek court relief to protect the interests of all shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1217) stock is a Buy with a HK$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Innovation Investment Limited stock, see the HK:1217 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Innovation Investment Limited

China Innovation Investment Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, is an investment company that holds substantial stakes in other listed entities, including Elife Holdings Limited. Through its shareholdings, it is an active financial investor focusing on governance and compliance matters at its portfolio companies to safeguard shareholder interests.

Average Trading Volume: 20,047,575

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$166.4M

Learn more about 1217 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Lion Finance Group PLC has disclosed that Apex Group Fiduciary Services, acting as trustee of the BOG Group Employee Trust, purchased 3,600 ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange at an average price of £96.01 per share on 23 January 2026. data.title: Provident Financial Services Launches New Stock Repurchase Program
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Provident Financial Services ( (PFS) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 26, 2026, Provident Financial Services, Inc. announced that its board has authorized the company’s tenth stock repurchase program, which will begin after completion of its existing program that has 814,247 shares remaining. Combined, the new and existing authorizations allow the repurchase of up to 2.15% of the company’s outstanding common stock, or about 2.81 million shares, via open market purchases, negotiated transactions, block trades or Rule 10b5‑1 trading plans, with no set expiration date or completion timeframe. Executives framed the move as a reflection of the bank’s strong balance sheet, earnings outlook and capital formation, emphasizing that the added buyback capacity enhances capital return flexibility and is intended to support shareholder value while remaining subject to market conditions, regulatory considerations and SEC safe harbor rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (PFS) stock is a Buy with a $22.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Provident Financial Services stock, see the PFS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PFS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PFS is a Outperform.

Provident Financial Services is well-positioned with strong financial performance, robust technical indicators, and an attractive valuation. The recent earnings call highlighted record earnings and revenue, supporting a positive outlook. While there are challenges, such as revenue decline and increased competition, the company’s strengths in profitability, cash flow, and market momentum contribute to a favorable stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on PFS stock, click here.

More about Provident Financial Services

Provident Financial Services, Inc. is the holding company for Provident Bank, a community-oriented bank that has operated since 1839. Provident Bank offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services, including traditional banking, fiduciary and wealth management through Beacon Trust Company, and insurance services via Provident Protection Plus, Inc., serving customers across New Jersey, parts of Pennsylvania, and New York’s Orange, Queens and Nassau counties.

Average Trading Volume: 847,928

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.69B

An update from Weatherford International ( (WFRD) ) is now available.

On January 27, 2026, Weatherford International plc announced that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.275 per ordinary share, a 10% increase from the previous quarterly payout, signaling confidence in the company’s financial position and cash-generation capabilities. The dividend will be paid on March 5, 2026 to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026, underscoring Weatherford’s continued emphasis on shareholder returns and potentially enhancing its appeal to income-focused investors within the oilfield services sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (WFRD) stock is a Buy with a $100.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Weatherford International stock, see the WFRD Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WFRD is a Outperform.

Overall score is supported by improving profitability metrics and reduced leverage, plus strong technical uptrend (price above all key moving averages with positive MACD). The score is tempered by declining revenue and falling free cash flow growth, and by earnings-call risks around pricing pressure, tariffs, and payment collection uncertainty despite constructive Q4 guidance.

To see Spark’s full report on WFRD stock, click here.

Weatherford International plc is an energy services company that provides equipment and services to the oil and gas industry, focusing on technologies and solutions that support drilling, production, and reservoir management for global upstream operators.
